message:
feat(messaging): add Redis client with RESP protocol (bd-9vfn)

Add Redis client module with:
- RESP protocol encode/decode implementation
- RedisClient with Cx integration for cancel-correct commands
- Configuration from URL (redis://[password@]host[:port][/database])
- Basic command stubs (GET, SET, INCR)
- Unit tests for RESP encoding and URL parsing

Phase 0 implementation - actual TCP I/O requires reactor integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+//! Messaging clients for external services (Redis, NATS, Kafka).
+//!
+//! This module provides cancel-correct clients for common messaging systems,
+//! all integrated with the Asupersync `Cx` context for proper cancellation handling.
+
+pub mod redis;
+
+pub use redis::{RedisClient, RedisConfig, RedisError};
